subject: Issues trying to run BoxNet2
body:
Hello,

Currently I'm trying to use Boxnet to mask gold fiducials but I seem to be 
having issues getting Boxnet to work in general.  Essentially whenever I 
run any pretrained Boxnet model (any of the ones in the public repository 
or Goldnet), no particles are found in any micrograph.  There is no error 
or crash after running the models, it loads the model pretty quickly, and 
analyzes the micrographs to report that no particles are found.  

Currently we are running Warp 1.0.9 and I had to download the Boxnet models 
via the Public Repository so its possible I may have downloaded the files 
to the wrong locations.  Any advice or help troubleshooting would be 
greatly appreciated.
